hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "const i=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'); const inp=JSON.parse(i); const cmd=inp.command||''; if(!/git\s+commit/.test(cmd)) process.exit(0); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try { const out=execSync('cd /Users/feivel/WebstormProjects/fp && npx vitest run --reporter=json 2>/dev/null',{timeout:60000}).toString(); const r=JSON.parse(out); if(r.numFailedTests>0){console.error('BLOCKED: '+r.numFailedTests+' test(s) failing. Fix before committing.'); process.exit(2);} else {console.log(r.numPassedTests+' tests passed. Commit allowed.');} } catch(e){ console.error('BLOCKED: Test run failed: '+e.message); process.exit(2); }"
